role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on scripts, place names ('JLR', 'Tupac Amaru'), and language (Spanish/Latin).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, altitude, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified vegetation types (Eucalyptus, scrub) and their biogeography.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road markings, curb styles, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, street furniture) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Peru by leveraging the linguistic evidence ('Tupac Amaru') as the primary differentiator against Bolivia, supported by consistent landscape and regulatory cues. The agents stayed in their lanes and provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on signs accurately transcribed and interpreted.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Terrain and building styles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Vegetation descriptions (Eucalyptus, scrub) match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Curb and road features accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: General aesthetic and infrastructure details match.
